title: berteroa spathulata
intro: Berteroa spathulata, also known as Hoary Alison or Hoary Whitetop, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Berteroa spathulata include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Berteroa spathulata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
